steps.title: Identify the design shift
steps.content: The text says Barragán's career evolved after he traveled to the United States and Europe and absorbed international architectural ideas. It contrasts an early, historically inspired house with a later apartment building using unadorned geometric forms. That contrast shows a notable aesthetic shift rather than a static design style.

steps.title: Reject reversed claims
steps.content: A misclassifies the Harper de Garibi House as modernist, C invents a judgment that it was more experimental, and D reverses the timeline by making modernism the early style instead over time. The answer is B.
